settings.title: Server actions
settings.rename_help: Pick a new display name. This updates the name in Pelican and in the panel.
settings.rename_error: The rename request failed. Try again in a moment.
settings.reinstall_warning: Reinstall will re-run the egg install script. It can overwrite configuration files and, depending on the egg, wipe data. This action cannot be undone.
settings.reinstall_warning_wipe: Every file in /mnt/server will be permanently deleted before the egg's install script runs. Worlds, configs, plugins, mods — everything. This action is irreversible. Back up first if you need to keep anything.
settings.reinstall_wipe_label: Delete all server data and reinstall
settings.reinstall_wipe_help: Wipes /mnt/server first, then triggers the reinstall — same end state as a freshly created server.
settings.reinstall_confirm_help: Type the server name "{{name}}" to confirm.
settings.reinstall_name_mismatch: The server name you typed doesn't match.
settings.reinstall_error: The reinstall request failed. Try again in a moment.
